findings.description: The knowledge file renders the ValidationUtil class description using 'ValidationManager' where the source's class definition table says 'ValidatorManager'. The source class table entry reads: 'システムリポジトリから ValidatorManager を取得し、呼び出しを行うユーティリティクラス。' The knowledge file silently corrects this to 'ValidationManager'. While 'ValidationManager' is the correct class name used throughout the rest of the source document (e.g., in the sequence section), the knowledge file modified the literal text of the class table entry.
findings.source_evidence: Source class table: 'nablarch.core.validation.ValidationUtil | システムリポジトリから ValidatorManager を取得し、呼び出しを行うユーティリティクラス。'
